Skill Path: Courtly Affairs

Conversing with nobility and the leading caste is second nature to you.

While developing your skills in Society you chose to focus specifically on Courtly Affairs, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.JtjnFsOToBLnSRO9]{Courtly Graces}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.9m4pmTwEGElJQFUN]{Public Speaker}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.JtjnFsOToBLnSRO9]{Courtly Graces}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.9m4pmTwEGElJQFUN]{Public Speaker}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iCv8KTZ5PcF4GqeV]{Leverage Connections}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ThoOsKjn5xCuZUqM]{Quick Contacts}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.JaG1SfG4iB6gJO9y]{Command the Assembly}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Zf4yiLDdxHPovEQI]{Legendary Codebreaker}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.n0S0tJiOJPQk0Rne]{Legendary Linguist}
